target:configuration-properties.target:property: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns2="http://www.fiorano.com/Seylan/TransactionHistoryInquiry" xmlns:ns1="http://www.fiorano.com/services/rest" xmlns:CEFT_JPAY="CEFT_JPAY" xmlns:CardWS="CardWS" xmlns:CenturyDateConv="CenturyDateConv" xmlns:CenturyDateConverter="CenturyDateConverter" xmlns:Currency="Currency" xmlns:DateConversion="DateConversion" xmlns:DateTime="DateTime" xmlns:Decimals="Decimals" xmlns:ENIQR="ENIQR" xmlns:ESB="ESB" xmlns:FormatQuery="FormatQuery" xmlns:JustpayTransfer_BuildDS="JustpayTransfer_BuildDS" xmlns:LPOPP="LPOPP" xmlns:QR="QR" xmlns:RateConverter="RateConverter" xmlns:Text="Text" xmlns:TimeConversion="TimeConversion" xmlns:UtilityBIll="UtilityBIll" xmlns:Validation="Validation" xmlns:VisaMasterQR="VisaMasterQR" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:paddzero="paddzero" xmlns:str="str" xmlns:strings="strings" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math CEFT_JPAY CardWS CenturyDateConv CenturyDateConverter Currency DateConversion DateTime Decimals ENIQR ESB FormatQuery JustpayTransfer_BuildDS LPOPP QR RateConverter Text TimeConversion UtilityBIll Validation VisaMasterQR dateConversion myext paddzero str strings"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Responses> <Response> <xsl:attribute name="Status"> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(TH_Header/Status)=('R')"> <xsl:value-of select="'200'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'400'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <Representations> <Representation> <xsl:attribute name="MediaType"> <xsl:value-of select="'application/xml'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <Element> <ns2:TransactionHistoryInquiryResponse> <ns2:Status> <ns2:Transaction_Reference> <xsl:value-of select="TH_Header/TransRef"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Transaction_Reference> <ns2:Timestamp> <xsl:value-of select="DateTime:getISOTimestamp()"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Timestamp> <ns2:Code> <xsl:variable name="if1"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(TH_Header/Status)=('R')"> <xsl:value-of select="'0000'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="ESB:MapEquationError(string(TH_Header/Message),string('2020'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if1"></xsl:value-of> <xsl:variable name="if2"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(TH_Header/Status)=('R')"> <xsl:value-of select="'0000'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="ESB:MapEquationError(string(TH_Header/Message),string('2020'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'erc', $if2)"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Code> <ns2:Message> <xsl:value-of select="ESB:getErrorDescriptionMapped(string(java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'erc')),string('2100|Account'))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Message> <ns2:Description> <xsl:value-of select="ESB:CleanMessage(string(TH_Header/Message))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Description> </ns2:Status> <ns2:AccountSummary> <ns2:Account_branch> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AB"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_branch> <ns2:Account_basic_number> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AN"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_basic_number> <ns2:Account_suffix> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_suffix> <ns2:Account_short_name> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/SHN"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_short_name> <ns2:Customer_mnemonic> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/CUS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Customer_mnemonic> <ns2:Customer_location> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/CLC"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Customer_location> <ns2:Account_type> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/ACT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_type> <ns2:Owning_application_code> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/APP"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Owning_application_code> <ns2:Account_structure> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/ACS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_structure> <ns2:Currency_mnemonic> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/CCY"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Currency_mnemonic> <ns2:Currency_decimals> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/CED"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Currency_decimals> <ns2:Internal_non_customer_account> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AI47"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Internal_non_customer_account> <ns2:Deceased_or_liquidated> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AI14"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Deceased_or_liquidated> <ns2:Account_blocked> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AI17"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_blocked> <ns2:Account_inactive> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AI20"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_inactive> <ns2:Account_closed> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AI30"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_closed> <ns2:Contingent_account> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/AI46"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Contingent_account> <ns2:Date_from> <xsl:value-of select="CenturyDateConverter:CenturyDateConversion(string($document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/DTEF),string('N'))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Date_from> <ns2:Date_to> <xsl:variable name="if3"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'erc'))=('0910')"> <xsl:value-of select="TH_Header/Date_to"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/DTET"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="CenturyDateConverter:CenturyDateConversion(string($if3),string('N'))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Date_to> <ns2:Starting_balance> <xsl:value-of select="Decimals:getDecimalFormattedAmount(string($document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/SBAL),string($document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/CED))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Starting_balance> <ns2:Number_of_recent_transactions> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/TBCK"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Number_of_recent_transactions> <ns2:Statement_number> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/SSTN"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Statement_number> <ns2:Available_balance> <xsl:value-of select="Decimals:getDecimalFormattedAmount(string($document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/ABAL),string($document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/ACINFO/CED))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Available_balance> </ns2:AccountSummary><Transaction class="array"> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/Message/Response/XMLRoot/TRINFO"> <ns2:Transaction> <ns2:Posting_date> <xsl:value-of select="CenturyDateConverter:CenturyDateConversion(string(./POD),string('N'))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Posting_date> <ns2:Value_date> <xsl:value-of select="CenturyDateConverter:CenturyDateConversion(string(./VFR),string('N'))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Value_date> <ns2:Posting_currency> <xsl:value-of select="./CCYP"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Posting_currency> <ns2:Posting_currency_decimals> <xsl:value-of select="./CEDP"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Posting_currency_decimals> <ns2:Transaction_code> <xsl:value-of select="./TCD"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Transaction_code> <ns2:Transaction_code_mnemonic> <xsl:value-of select="./TCM"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Transaction_code_mnemonic> <ns2:Transaction_Code_Name> <xsl:value-of select="./TCDD"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Transaction_Code_Name> <ns2:Input_branch_mnemonic> <xsl:value-of select="./BRNM"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Input_branch_mnemonic> <ns2:Account_branch_mnemonic> <xsl:value-of select="./BRND"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Account_branch_mnemonic> <ns2:Posting_group> <xsl:value-of select="./PBR"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Posting_group> <ns2:Posting_amount> <xsl:value-of select="Decimals:getDecimalFormattedAmount(string(./AMAP),string(./CEDP))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Posting_amount> <ns2:Print_transaction_code_name_as_narrative> <xsl:value-of select="./PTN"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Print_transaction_code_name_as_narrative> <ns2:Transaction_Status> <xsl:value-of select="./NEGP"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Transaction_Status> <ns2:Users_own_reference> <xsl:value-of select="./DRF"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Users_own_reference> <ns2:Sundry_reference_code> <xsl:value-of select="./SRC"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Sundry_reference_code> <ns2:User_code_1> <xsl:value-of select="./UC1"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:User_code_1> <ns2:User_code_2> <xsl:value-of select="./UC2"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:User_code_2> <ns2:Number_of_items_within_this_posting> <xsl:value-of select="./NPE"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Number_of_items_within_this_posting> <ns2:Statement_number> <xsl:value-of select="./STN"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Statement_number> <ns2:Narrative_record_exists> <xsl:value-of select="./YNAR"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Narrative_record_exists> <ns2:Narrative_1> <xsl:value-of select="./NR1"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Narrative_1> <ns2:Narrative_2> <xsl:value-of select="./NR2"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Narrative_2> <ns2:Narrative_3> <xsl:value-of select="./NR3"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Narrative_3> <ns2:Narrative_4> <xsl:value-of select="./NR4"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Narrative_4> <ns2:Additional_line_1> <xsl:value-of select="./A001"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Additional_line_1> <ns2:Additional_line_2> <xsl:value-of select="./A002"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Additional_line_2> <ns2:Additional_line_3> <xsl:value-of select="./A003"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Additional_line_3> <ns2:Additional_line_4> <xsl:value-of select="./A004"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Additional_line_4> <ns2:Additional_line_5> <xsl:value-of select="./A005"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Additional_line_5> <ns2:Additional_line_6> <xsl:value-of select="./A006"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Additional_line_6> <ns2:Original_currency> <xsl:value-of select="./OCCY"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Original_currency> <ns2:Original_currency_decimals> <xsl:value-of select="./OCED"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Original_currency_decimals> <ns2:Original_amount> <xsl:value-of select="Decimals:getDecimalFormattedAmount(string(./OAMA),string(./OCED))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Original_amount> <ns2:Posting_sequence_number> <xsl:value-of select="./PSQ7"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Posting_sequence_number> <ns2:Running_balance> <xsl:value-of select="Decimals:getDecimalFormattedAmount(string(./RBAL),string(./CEDP))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Running_balance> <ns2:Event_key> <xsl:value-of select="./EVNK"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Event_key> <ns2:Available_Date> <xsl:value-of select="CenturyDateConverter:CenturyDateConversion(string(./AVD),string('N'))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Available_Date> <ns2:Timestamp> <xsl:value-of select="./TSTP"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Timestamp> <ns2:Unique_key> <xsl:value-of select="concat(Text:padright(string(./BRNM),string(' '),string('3')),normalize-space(Text:padright(string(./PBR),string(' '),string('4'))),substring(./POD,'2','6'),Text:padleft(string(./PSQ7),string('0'),string('7')))"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:Unique_key> </ns2:Transaction> </xsl:for-each></Transaction></ns2:TransactionHistoryInquiryResponse> </Element> </Representation> </Representations> </Response> </ns1:Responses> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> </xsl:stylesheet>
